title: Weftmap
hero: Understand any code at a glance.
tagline: Paste code and get an interactive call graph. Multi-language via Tree-sitter.

steps.title: Paste your code
steps.desc: Pick a language and drop in a snippet — no setup, no upload.

steps.title: Tree-sitter parses it
steps.desc: A real syntax tree is built on the server, fast and language-agnostic.

steps.title: Explore the call graph
steps.desc: Pan, zoom and follow how functions call each other.

features.title: Multi-language
features.desc: One parsing engine, many languages. Powered by Tree-sitter.

features.title: Interactive diagrams
features.desc: Pan, zoom and explore the call graph of your code.

features.title: Pluggable
features.desc: Add a new language in just a few lines. Built to extend.

features.title: Accurate parsing
features.desc: Real syntax trees via Tree-sitter, not fragile regex.

features.title: No setup
features.desc: Paste a snippet and visualize. Nothing to install.

footerNote: Open source, built to be extended.
noFunctions: No functions found in the code.
noTables: No tables found in the SQL.
projectHint: Pick a folder — its files are mapped as one project graph.
notFoundTitle: This page got lost in the graph
notFoundDesc: The link may be broken or the page may have moved. Let's get you back on track.
